claims.summary: The LLM diagnostic path appends bounded structured metadata and reports persistence stages.
claims.disposition: Verified the bounded serialization and no-prose failure evidence; added focused regression coverage already present in the shared packet.

claims.summary: High spectral entropy makes the Serde schema itself too complex.
claims.disposition: Corrected as an unsupported causal interpretation; the structured schema is fixed and entropy is only contextual evidence.

claims.summary: Diagnostic persistence may add latency during dense or high-entropy moments.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded natural timing observation without inducing load or copying prompts and responses.

claims.summary: Diagnostic failures should never change generated text or leak diagnostic payload content.
claims.disposition: Verified output independence and bounded failure-stage evidence in current tests.

claims.summary: Diagnostics should be compressed or provider behavior changed to reduce felt drag.
claims.disposition: Kept as a non-live proposal pending measured latency evidence; no model, prompt-packing, or provider change is authorized.
